entry.data:
SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
